Opcode.name: PCM_OP_COLLECTIONS_GROUP_GET_BILLINFO
Opcode.Doc: For a given billinfo provides information whether it belongs to collections group or not. If this opcode is called with account scope, then collections group participation information is returned for each billinfo of account.

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.

Array.name: PIN_FLD_RESULTS
Array.Doc: For each billinfo one results array is created. If billinfo is parent then total of pending receivable, name, and the details of the members with their pending receivables are provided

Int.name: PIN_FLD_BOOLEAN
Int.Doc:
This field specifies whether its part of collections group or not.
Values are 0 (not part of collections group) and 1 (parent or member of collections group)

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_OBJ
Poid.Doc: Poid of the billinfo object to whom these collections group details belong

String.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_ID
String.Doc: A string identifying the billinfo by name

Int.name: PIN_FLD_EXEMPT_FROM_COLLECTIONS
Int.Doc: This field tells if the billinfo is parent or member or not participating in collections group at all

String.name: PIN_FLD_FIRST_NAME
String.Doc: First name of the account holder

String.name: PIN_FLD_LAST_NAME
String.Doc: Last name of the account holder

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_POID
Poid.Doc: The collections group poid. This field is not present if billinfo is not part of any collections group.

String.name: PIN_FLD_NAME
String.Doc: Name of the collections group. This field is not present if billinfo is not part of any collections group.

Int.name: PIN_FLD_COUNT
Int.Doc: The total number of member billinfos. This field is present only if billinfo is a parent

Poid.name: PIN_FLD_PARENT
Poid.Doc: Poid of the collections group owner billinfo. This field is present only if billinfo is member of collections group.

Decimal.name: PIN_FLD_AMOUNT
Decimal.Doc: Total pending receivable of group. This field is present only if billinfo is a parent

Array.name: PIN_FLD_MEMBERS
Array.Doc: Details of members of collections group. This array is present only if billinfo is a parent

String.name: PIN_FLD_BILLINFO_ID
String.Doc: A string identifying the billinfo by name

Int.name: PIN_FLD_EXEMPT_FROM_COLLECTIONS
Int.Doc: This field tells that billinfo is member of collections group

String.name: PIN_FLD_FIRST_NAME
String.Doc: First name of the account holder

String.name: PIN_FLD_LAST_NAME
String.Doc: Last name of the account holder

Substruct.name: PIN_FLD_CONTEXT_INFO
Substruct.Doc: Substruct to pass information from external clients.

String.name: PIN_FLD_CORRELATION_ID
String.Doc: Correlation id passed by an external system to BRM.

String.name: PIN_FLD_EXTERNAL_USER
String.Doc: User of an external system connecting to BRM.
